summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Thryve Invoice Generator app. All core functionality working correctly including client management, invoice creation with proper GST calculations, PDF export, and dashboard statistics.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct stats display
Client CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
GST calculations (18% = 9% CGST + 9% SGST for taxable items)
Non-taxable items (Security Deposit, Setup Charges) have no GST
Invoice view with PDF export/print functionality
Responsive design and proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major functionality working, minor timing issues resolved)
